Package piece.pieces

Class Rook

java.lang.Object
piece.Piece
piece.pieces.Rook
public class Rook extends Piece
A rook piece.

  • Method Details

    • getPieceLetter

      public String getPieceLetter()
      Description copied from class: Piece
      Returns a letter that represents the piece (e.g. 'K' for King).
      Specified by:
      getPieceLetter in class Piece
      Returns:
      The letter.

    • candidateMoves

      protected Collection<Position> candidateMoves(Board board)
      Description copied from class: Piece
      Gets the candidate moves for the piece, i.e. all possible positions it could move to geometrically, without accounting for check or pieces in the way.
      Specified by:
      candidateMoves in class Piece
      Returns:
      A collection of positions representing the destinations of the possible moves.
